summary: Recording sounds noticeably better than the previous FOH source, though no performance details are provided.
review: The lone review focuses on the audio capture, noting that this FLAC24 file is a marked improvement over an earlier front‑of‑house recording that used Nak 300/CP4 microphones and a Sony mixer. No comments are made about the band's playing, setlist or any standout moments, so the musical quality of the show remains undocumented.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review (3‑star) mentioning recording improvements; no insight into performance quality, so rating reflects a neutral middle ground.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Uses Sennheiser 441 mics, Sony mixer, Sony D10 Pro recorded and EAC'd; reviewer says it is much better than a previous FOH source.
